title: scyphostelma tenellum
intro: Scyphostelma tenellum, also known as the slender velvet orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scyphostelma tenellum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and powdered to be used in teas or infusions, or it can be applied topically to the skin in the form of a paste.
